method: Gold substrates were cleaned using freshly prepared piranha solution (3:7 (v/v) mixture of 30% H2O2 and H2SO4) for 30 min at room temperature rinsed copiously with deionized water (Millipore Gradient) and dried under a nitrogen stream. The two types of SAMs, GSH and GSHTW 20, were prepared by immersing the cleaned gold substrates into the freshly prepared 5 mM Glutathione aqueous solution and 5 mM Glutathione aqueous solution with 0.1% (v/v) TW 20, respectively. The substrate surfaceswere left for 24 h at room temperature, in the absence of light, than were taken out from the solutions, washed with ethanol and deionized water, dried under an argon gas flow and kept in a dessicator for further characterization.

tech: Insilico method: MARTINI coarse - grained molecular dynamic
method: A simulation for each dipeptide (in their zwitterionic form) was set up using the GROMACS molecular dynamics package. A cubic box with 300 dipeptides, placed randomly with a minimum distance of 3 âˆšÃ– between them, was solvated in standard MARTINI CG water (four water molecules per bead) to a final concentration of â€šÃ Âº0.4 M. A Berendsen thermostat and barostat36 were used to keep the temperature at 303 K and pressure at 1 bar, respectively. Bond lengths in aromatic side chains and the backbone side-chain bonds in I, V, and Y were constrained using the LINCS algorithm.37 All boxes were energy minimized using the steepest descent integrator and then equilibrated for 4   106 time steps of 25 fs. The total screening simulation time equates to 100 ns, but because of the smoothness of the CG potentials, this roughly equates to an effective 400 ns of atomistic simulation time
